external_getSqrtPriceAtTick(int24).details: External wrapper for getSqrtPriceAtTick to allow vm.expectRevert

external_getTickAtSqrtPrice(uint160).details: External wrapper for getTickAtSqrtPrice to allow vm.expectRevert

testFuzz_approximation_sqrtToTickToSqrt(.details: Due to discrete ticks, exact equality is not expected. The recovered sqrtPrice      should be <= the original (since getTickAtSqrtPrice returns floor tick).

params.sqrtPriceX96: The fuzzed sqrt price to test

testFuzz_bijection_tickToSqrtToTick(int2.details: This is the primary bijection property: tick -> sqrtPrice -> tick is identity.      MAX_TICK is excluded because getSqrtPriceAtTick(MAX_TICK) returns MAX_SQRT_PRICE,      and getTickAtSqrtPrice requires input < MAX_SQRT_PRICE (exclusive upper bound).

params.tick: The fuzzed tick value to test

testFuzz_consecutiveTicks_distinctSqrtPr.details: Ensures no "flat spots" in the tick -> sqrtPrice mapping

testFuzz_monotonicity_sqrtPriceToTick(ui.details: Higher sqrt prices should produce >= ticks (floor function behavior)

testFuzz_monotonicity_tickToSqrtPrice(in.details: Higher ticks should always produce higher sqrt prices

test_edge_maxTick().details: getTickAtSqrtPrice(MAX_SQRT_PRICE) reverts - MAX_SQRT_PRICE is exclusive upper bound

testFuzz_consecutiveTicks_distinctSqrtPr.notice: Tests that consecutive ticks produce distinct sqrt prices

testFuzz_monotonicity_sqrtPriceToTick(ui.notice: Verifies that getTickAtSqrtPrice is monotonically non-decreasing

testFuzz_monotonicity_tickToSqrtPrice(in.notice: Verifies that getSqrtPriceAtTick is strictly monotonically increasing

test_bijection_boundaryPoints().notice: Tests bijection at strategic boundary points

test_edge_maxSqrtPriceMinusOne().notice: Tests MAX_SQRT_PRICE - 1 (highest valid input to getTickAtSqrtPrice)

test_getSqrtPriceAtTick_knownValues().notice: Tests getSqrtPriceAtTick with known tick/sqrtPrice pairs

test_getTickAtSqrtPrice_knownValues().notice: Tests getTickAtSqrtPrice with known sqrtPrice/tick pairs

test_revert_sqrtPriceAtMax().notice: Tests that sqrtPrice at MAX_SQRT_PRICE reverts (exclusive upper bound)

test_revert_sqrtPriceTooLow().notice: Tests that sqrtPrice below MIN_SQRT_PRICE reverts

test_revert_tickTooHigh().notice: Tests that tick above MAX_TICK reverts

test_revert_tickTooLow().notice: Tests that tick below MIN_TICK reverts
